title: Napkins Paper 33 x 33 cm 3-Ply Pack of 20 – High-Quality & Sustainable – Disposable Paper Napkins with Black Candles, Pine Cones & White Flower – Modern Christmas Motif in Gold and Black
features: Product: disposable napkins with black candles and wreath motif. Material: tissue paper, FSC certified. Size: approx. 33 x 33 cm (unfolded) or 16.5 x 16.5 cm (folded). Folding: 1/4 fold. Contents: 20 napkins. Colour: black, gold, white, green
Sustainable: environmentally friendly produced from FSC-certified paper, recyclable and printed with water-based inks
Christmas table decoration: our 3-ply Christmas napkins with candle motif are suitable as breakfast napkins, lunch napkins or gastro napkins
Versatile: ideal for Christmas parties, winter decoration, Advent boards or creative craft ideas with decoupage technique and DIY projects
Also for professional use: high-quality, recyclable table napkins are ideal for use in restaurants, events or in your café to entertain your guests tastefully
description: Disposable paper napkins / Christmas napkins / party napkins with black candles, pine cones and flower in modern style. Material: tissue, paper, FSC certified, size: approx. 33 x 33 cm (unfolded) or 16.5 x 16.5 cm (folded). Folding: 1/4 fold. Contents: 20 napkins. Colour: black, gold, white, green. - 3-ply, absorbent, soft, skin-friendly - made of high-quality fabric, made in the EU - Premium napkin print with water-based colours - Environmentally friendly, recyclable & sustainable, made from renewable sources - Packaging film made of recyclable PP - Ideal for catering, parties or at home These napkins with two black candles in gold holders and natural pine cones, branches and a white flower bring a classy, modern style to the festive table. The black metal ring with star gives the design a minimalist Scandinavian character. The disposable napkins are versatile and are suitable as breakfast napkins, lunch napkins or gastro napkins. The motif napkins complement your Christmas decoration during the Christmas season. These Christmas napkins set loving accents and can be wonderfully combined with rustic, classic or playful table decoration. The three-ply napkins are also great for creative craft ideas such as decoupage, decoupage or DIY projects. Pattern and motif: black candles, candle holders, metal ring, cones, flowers, fir branches, star - occasions and season: Christmas, Advent, winter time, holidays - style and design: modern, Scandinavian, elegant, minimalist, festive.
